title: Skill Shope Listing
description: Schema for publishing a skill, MCP server, or agent on Skill Shope

slug.description: URL-friendly identifier. Auto-generated from name if omitted

description.description: Short one-line description shown in search results

longDescription.description: Multi-paragraph description with features and usage details

sourceUrl.description: Optional public URL to source code or preview page (GitHub repo, npm package, etc.)

installCmd.description: Command users run to install (e.g., npx skillshope install my-skill)

compatibility.description: Comma-separated list of compatible tools (claude-code, codex, cursor)

listingType.description: original = your own skill, community = curating an existing open-source skill

originalAuthor.description: Name of original author (required for community listings)

originalUrl.description: URL to original author's profile or repo (for community listings)

isFree.description: Whether the skill is free or paid

price.description: Price in USD (required if isFree is false)

skillContent.description: The actual SKILL.md content delivered to users via CLI
